Rheumatoid Arthritis

Disease intelligence for Rheumatoid Arthritis: 186 alterations and 544 ranked therapeutics from curated public databases.

US DALYs220.4KWHO GHE 2021 · all ages
Global DALYs3.08MWHO GHE 2021 · worldwide
US mortality1,866 deaths/yrWHO GHE 2021
Global mortality37.4K deaths/yrWHO GHE 2021 · worldwide

Funding levelModerate

Disease overview

Sources: Seeds, Open Targets, HPO, ClinicalTrials.gov, DGIdb, ChEMBL, PubMed MeSH, PubMed Literature · Pipeline phase 7 · Updated 2026-07-05

Remission & chronicity

Spontaneous remission
11% achieve drug-free remission (DFR) at median 74 months; most cohorts show 10-15% DFR ceiling
Best-intervention remission
Early aggressive treat-to-target improves DFR rates modestly; some biologic-era cohorts reach 20-25% DFR; on-drug remission rates (DAS28 <2.6) reach 40-60% with modern biologics and JAK inhibitors
Drug-free remission
—
Relapse after remission
—
Chronicity
—
Gap size
Small for drug-free remission (biological ceiling is genuinely low); large gap between on-drug remission and drug-free remission
Primary barrier
biological (DFR); practice (on-drug remission underachieved due to treatment inertia)
Barrier detail: Treat-to-target strategy is guideline-recommended but poorly implemented in routine care; many patients remain on inadequate therapy without escalation

Last SoC change: 2021 — ACR guidelines added JAK inhibitors with safety caveats; IL-6 inhibitors and IL-17 added to biologics ladder; treat-to-target explicitly endorsed; first-line (MTX) unchanged since 1990s

Remission data layers: disease_db_100 · source-locked manual data · confidence: high

Related: Biomarker atlas · Intervention atlas

Identifiers: MONDO: MONDO:0008383 · EFO: EFO_0000685 · OMIM: 180300 · ORPHA: ORPHA:284963 · MESH: D001172 · UMLS_CUI: C0003873

Therapeutics

Direct disease associations, biomarker-linked drugs, OSMF narrative-review natural agents, and merged ranking. Only agents with registry trials or published clinical literature are shown by default.

TACROLIMUS ANHYDROUS Small molecule Approved Strong 105 Varies — check openprescribing.net (UK) or costplusdrugs.com / GoodRx (US)
8 trials
View evidence

Registry trials

  • NCT07138898 — Immunosuppressant Management in Rheumatology Patients Undergoing Elective Total Shoulder Arthroplasty (NOT_YET_RECRUITING) PHASE2
  • NCT03737708 — A Study Comparing Biologics + Methotrexate With Biologics + Tacrolimus in Patients With Rheumatoid Arthritis (RA) (COMPLETED) PHASE4
  • NCT01850979 — Treatment of Dry Eye Using 0.03% Tacrolimus Eye Drops (COMPLETED) PHASE4
  • NCT01746680 — Efficacy and Safety Study of Tacrobell to Treat Rheumatoid Arthritis (COMPLETED) PHASE4
  • NCT00036153 — Study to Assess Efficacy of Tacrolimus + Methotrexate Versus Placebo + Methotrexate in Treatment of Rheumatoid Arthritis (COMPLETED) PHASE3
  • NCT01224418 — A Study to Evaluate the Efficacy of Tacrolimus in Rheumatoid Arthritis Patients Shown Unsuccessful Response to Methotrexate (COMPLETED) PHASE4
  • NCT01511003 — A Study is to Assess Efficacy and Safety of Tacrolimus in Active Rheumatoid Arthritis Patients Who Showed Unsuccessful Response to Existing Disease Modifying Antirheumatic Drugs (DMARDs) (COMPLETED) PHASE4
  • NCT00319917 — A Double Blind Placebo Controlled Study to Assess the Efficacy on Joint Damage in RA Patients (COMPLETED) PHASE4

ABATACEPT Biologic Approved Strong 100 Varies — check openprescribing.net (UK) or costplusdrugs.com / GoodRx (US)
8 trials 57 Cochrane 74 Meta-analysis 126 Trial pubs 102 RCT
View evidence

Registry trials

  • NCT00547521 — Phase IIIB Subcutaneous Abatacept Monotherapy Study (COMPLETED) PHASE3
  • NCT04909801 — A Study to Compare the Response to Treatment With Abatacept vs Adalimumab, on Background Methotrexate, in Adults With Early, Seropositive, and Shared Epitope-positive Rheumatoid Arthritis and an Inadequate Response to Methotrexate (ACTIVE_NOT_RECRUITING) PHASE3
  • NCT01299961 — Ultrasound Scores as Indication of Response to Subcutaneous Abatacept in Subjects With Rheumatoid Arthritis (COMPLETED) PHASE3
  • NCT04251741 — Using Adalimumab Serum Concentration to Choose a Subsequent Biological DMARD in Rheumatoid Arthritis Patients Failing Adalimumab Treatment (UNKNOWN) PHASE4
  • NCT03288584 — Effects of Interleukin-6 Inhibition on Vascular, Endothelial and Left Ventricular Function in Rheumatoid Arthritis (UNKNOWN)
  • NCT02500498 — Safety Profile of Nulojix in Home Infusion Settings (COMPLETED)
  • NCT00947492 — Monitoring Epstein-Barr Virus (EBV) Load in Rheumatoid Arthritis Patients Treated With New Immunosuppressive Drugs (UNKNOWN) NA
  • NCT03187444 — Cardiovascular Risk and Chronic Inflammatory Rheumatism (ACTIVE_NOT_RECRUITING) NA

Published literature

  • Cochrane review Detectable safety gestalt of rheumatoid arthritis treatments from pivotal clinical drug trials (Rheumatology (Oxford, England), 2026)
  • Cochrane review Efficacy of synthetic and biological DMARDs: a systematic literature review informing the 2025 update of the EULAR recommendations for the management of rheumatoid arthritis (Annals of the rheumatic diseases, 2026)
  • Cochrane review Effect of targeted therapies on pulmonary function in rheumatoid arthritis-associated interstitial lung disease: a systematic review and meta-analysis (RMD open, 2026)
  • Cochrane review Long-term persistence of biological agents in the treatment of patients with rheumatoid arthritis: a systematic literature review and meta-analysis (Clinical rheumatology, 2026)
  • Cochrane review Mechanism and clinical utility of abatacept in the treatment of rheumatoid arthritis (Expert opinion on drug safety, 2026)
  • Meta-analysis Updated systematic literature review and meta-analysis to inform the Italian Society of Rheumatology Recommendations on the treatment of rheumatoid arthritis-associated interstitial lung disease (Autoimmunity reviews, 2025)
  • Meta-analysis Abatacept and the risk of malignancy: a meta-analysis across disease indications (Rheumatology (Oxford, England), 2025)
  • Systematic review Treatment of rheumatoid arthritis-associated interstitial lung disease: What is new since the 2022 SER-SEPAR recommendations? (Reumatologia clinica, 2026)
  • Systematic review From Methotrexate Resistance to Biologic and Targeted Pharmacotherapy: A Decade of Phase 4 Clinical Trials Evidence in Rheumatoid Arthritis (Drug design, development and therapy, 2026)
  • Clinical trial publication Efficacy and safety of branebrutinib (BMS-986195), an irreversible Bruton's tyrosine kinase inhibitor, for the treatment of rheumatoid arthritis: a phase 2a, randomised, double-blind, placebo-controlled study (The Lancet. Rheumatology, 2026)
  • Clinical trial publication Certolizumab pegol, abatacept, tocilizumab or active conventional therapy in early rheumatoid arthritis: 48-week patient-reported outcomes from the NORD-STAR trial (The Lancet. Rheumatology, 2026)
  • Clinical trial publication Safety and immunogenicity of the recombinant zoster vaccine in patients with rheumatoid arthritis using abatacept: a pilot multicentre, double-blind, randomised controlled trial (Annals of the rheumatic diseases, 2026)

Registry trials

  • NCT01185301 — Study to Determine the Effects of Different Doses of Methotrexate (MTX) When Taken With Adalimumab in Subjects With Early Rheumatoid Arthritis (RA) (COMPLETED) PHASE3
  • NCT00690573 — Safety, Efficacy, and Pharmacokinetics of Adalimumab in Japanese Children With Juvenile Rheumatoid Arthritis (COMPLETED) PHASE3

  • NCT04985435 — Better After CHoosing. Randomly Allocated or Patient Preference Based Treatment With Filgotinib or TNFi in RA (BACH) (RECRUITING) PHASE4
  • NCT01692899 — Retention Rates of Adalimumab, Etanercept and Infliximab as First and Second-Line Biotherapy in Patients With Rheumatoid Arthritis in Daily Practice (COMPLETED)
  • NCT01592292 — An Observational Study of MabThera (Rituximab) in Patients With Rheumatoid Arthritis And Inadequate Response Or Intolerance to a First Anti-TNF Alpha Therapy (COMPLETED)
  • NCT04909801 — A Study to Compare the Response to Treatment With Abatacept vs Adalimumab, on Background Methotrexate, in Adults With Early, Seropositive, and Shared Epitope-positive Rheumatoid Arthritis and an Inadequate Response to Methotrexate (ACTIVE_NOT_RECRUITING) PHASE3

  • Meta-analysis Efficacy and safety of rituximab in rheumatoid arthritis-associated interstitial lung disease: a systematic review and meta-analysis (Expert opinion on biological therapy, 2025)
  • Meta-analysis Updated systematic literature review and meta-analysis to inform the Italian Society of Rheumatology Recommendations on the treatment of rheumatoid arthritis-associated interstitial lung disease (Autoimmunity reviews, 2025)
  • Systematic review Treatment of rheumatoid arthritis-associated interstitial lung disease: What is new since the 2022 SER-SEPAR recommendations? (Reumatologia clinica, 2026)
  • Clinical trial publication Transcriptomic stratification predicts response to rituximab, abatacept, or the association of hydroxychloroquine and leflunomide in 3 randomised controlled clinical trials of Sjögren's disease (Annals of the rheumatic diseases, 2026)
  • Clinical trial publication Deep molecular profiling of synovial biopsies in the STRAP trial identifies signatures predictive of treatment response to biologic therapies in rheumatoid arthritis (Nature communications, 2025)
  • Clinical trial publication Comparing immunogenicity and safety following transition from reference rituximab to biosimilar rituximab (DRL_RI) in patients with rheumatoid arthritis: a randomized, double-blind, phase 3 study (Arthritis research & therapy, 2024)

Registry trials

  • NCT01299961 — Ultrasound Scores as Indication of Response to Subcutaneous Abatacept in Subjects With Rheumatoid Arthritis (COMPLETED) PHASE3
  • NCT04251741 — Using Adalimumab Serum Concentration to Choose a Subsequent Biological DMARD in Rheumatoid Arthritis Patients Failing Adalimumab Treatment (UNKNOWN) PHASE4
  • NCT03288584 — Effects of Interleukin-6 Inhibition on Vascular, Endothelial and Left Ventricular Function in Rheumatoid Arthritis (UNKNOWN)
  • NCT02500498 — Safety Profile of Nulojix in Home Infusion Settings (COMPLETED)
  • NCT00947492 — Monitoring Epstein-Barr Virus (EBV) Load in Rheumatoid Arthritis Patients Treated With New Immunosuppressive Drugs (UNKNOWN) NA
  • NCT03187444 — Cardiovascular Risk and Chronic Inflammatory Rheumatism (ACTIVE_NOT_RECRUITING) NA

Published literature

  • Cochrane review Detectable safety gestalt of rheumatoid arthritis treatments from pivotal clinical drug trials (Rheumatology (Oxford, England), 2026)
  • Cochrane review Efficacy of synthetic and biological DMARDs: a systematic literature review informing the 2025 update of the EULAR recommendations for the management of rheumatoid arthritis (Annals of the rheumatic diseases, 2026)
  • Cochrane review Effect of targeted therapies on pulmonary function in rheumatoid arthritis-associated interstitial lung disease: a systematic review and meta-analysis (RMD open, 2026)
  • Cochrane review Long-term persistence of biological agents in the treatment of patients with rheumatoid arthritis: a systematic literature review and meta-analysis (Clinical rheumatology, 2026)
  • Cochrane review Mechanism and clinical utility of abatacept in the treatment of rheumatoid arthritis (Expert opinion on drug safety, 2026)
  • Meta-analysis Updated systematic literature review and meta-analysis to inform the Italian Society of Rheumatology Recommendations on the treatment of rheumatoid arthritis-associated interstitial lung disease (Autoimmunity reviews, 2025)
  • Meta-analysis Abatacept and the risk of malignancy: a meta-analysis across disease indications (Rheumatology (Oxford, England), 2025)
  • Systematic review Treatment of rheumatoid arthritis-associated interstitial lung disease: What is new since the 2022 SER-SEPAR recommendations? (Reumatologia clinica, 2026)
  • Systematic review From Methotrexate Resistance to Biologic and Targeted Pharmacotherapy: A Decade of Phase 4 Clinical Trials Evidence in Rheumatoid Arthritis (Drug design, development and therapy, 2026)
  • Clinical trial publication Efficacy and safety of branebrutinib (BMS-986195), an irreversible Bruton's tyrosine kinase inhibitor, for the treatment of rheumatoid arthritis: a phase 2a, randomised, double-blind, placebo-controlled study (The Lancet. Rheumatology, 2026)
  • Clinical trial publication Certolizumab pegol, abatacept, tocilizumab or active conventional therapy in early rheumatoid arthritis: 48-week patient-reported outcomes from the NORD-STAR trial (The Lancet. Rheumatology, 2026)
  • Clinical trial publication Safety and immunogenicity of the recombinant zoster vaccine in patients with rheumatoid arthritis using abatacept: a pilot multicentre, double-blind, randomised controlled trial (Annals of the rheumatic diseases, 2026)

View evidence

Published literature

  • Cochrane review Non-steroidal anti-inflammatory drugs (NSAIDs) for chronic non-cancer pain in children and adolescents (The Cochrane database of systematic reviews, 2017)
  • Cochrane review Topical analgesics for acute and chronic pain in adults - an overview of Cochrane Reviews (The Cochrane database of systematic reviews, 2017)
  • Meta-analysis Flurbiprofen in the symptomatic management of rheumatoid arthritis: a valuable alternative (International journal of clinical practice, 2007)
  • Systematic review Natural and iatrogenic ocular manifestations of rheumatoid arthritis: a systematic review (International ophthalmology, 2022)
  • Systematic review Acupuncture for rheumatoid arthritis: a systematic review (Rheumatology (Oxford, England), 2008)
  • Clinical trial publication Chronotherapeutic drug delivery from indomethacin compression coated tablets for early morning pain associated rheumatoid arthritis (Current drug delivery, 2013)
  • Clinical trial publication Effects of selective and non-selective cyclo-oxygenase inhibition on endothelial function in patients with rheumatoid arthritis (Scandinavian journal of rheumatology, 2007)
  • Clinical trial publication [Effect of strengthening Pi and activating blood circulation therapy on serum levels of adrenocorticotrophic hormone and vascular endothelial growth factor in rheumatoid arthritis patients] (Zhongguo Zhong xi yi jie he za zhi Zhongguo Zhongxiyi jiehe zazhi = Chinese journal of integrated traditional and Western medicine, 2007)
  • Clinical trial publication Effects of the topical treatment with NSAIDs on corneal sensitivity and ocular surface of Sjögren's syndrome patients (Eye (London, England), 2005)
  • Clinical trial publication Ketotifen in prevention of indomethacin-induced gastropathy (Indian journal of gastroenterology : official journal of the Indian Society of Gastroenterology, 1999)

  • Meta-analysis Flurbiprofen in the symptomatic management of rheumatoid arthritis: a valuable alternative (International journal of clinical practice, 2007)
  • Systematic review Natural and iatrogenic ocular manifestations of rheumatoid arthritis: a systematic review (International ophthalmology, 2022)
  • Systematic review Acupuncture for rheumatoid arthritis: a systematic review (Rheumatology (Oxford, England), 2008)
  • Clinical trial publication Chronotherapeutic drug delivery from indomethacin compression coated tablets for early morning pain associated rheumatoid arthritis (Current drug delivery, 2013)
  • Clinical trial publication Effects of selective and non-selective cyclo-oxygenase inhibition on endothelial function in patients with rheumatoid arthritis (Scandinavian journal of rheumatology, 2007)
  • Clinical trial publication [Effect of strengthening Pi and activating blood circulation therapy on serum levels of adrenocorticotrophic hormone and vascular endothelial growth factor in rheumatoid arthritis patients] (Zhongguo Zhong xi yi jie he za zhi Zhongguo Zhongxiyi jiehe zazhi = Chinese journal of integrated traditional and Western medicine, 2007)
  • Clinical trial publication Effects of the topical treatment with NSAIDs on corneal sensitivity and ocular surface of Sjögren's syndrome patients (Eye (London, England), 2005)
  • Clinical trial publication Ketotifen in prevention of indomethacin-induced gastropathy (Indian journal of gastroenterology : official journal of the Indian Society of Gastroenterology, 1999)
